TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Don_Anielak, title = Don_Anielak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Anielak} }

S.FORM: Don Anielak nalecuhan i St. Louis, Missouri, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Don Anielak i 1954 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 26, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 11 bulad 1 demiad, 1930 a mihca, Don Anielak, miunduay. (mapatay i 1995 a mihca)
S.PHON: don ani…ôr~…æak nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i st. r~…æouis, missouri, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. don ani…ôr~…æak i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu n…ôw jork kni ¶ks putiput. ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, don ani…ôr~…æak, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miƒß ¶a)
